Description: (SO0320-sm-studio-domain) Modern Data Architecture Accelerator. Version VERSION

Properties.Name: /test-org/test-domain/test-sagemaker-studio-domain-main/aws-solution
Properties.Value: (SO0320-sm-studio-domain) Modern Data Architecture Accelerator. Version VERSION

lifecycleConfigContent.Fn::Base64:
export ASSETS_DIR=/tmp/lifecycle-assets/JupyterServer
aws s3 cp --recursive s3://test-domain-bucket/lifecycle-assets/JupyterServer/ $ASSETS_DIR
echo "testing jupyter"
sh $ASSETS_DIR/testing/test.sh

export ASSETS_DIR=/tmp/lifecycle-assets/JupyterLab
aws s3 cp --recursive s3://test-domain-bucket/lifecycle-assets/JupyterLab/ $ASSETS_DIR
echo "testing jupyterlab (Studio Latest)"
pip install --upgrade pandas numpy scikit-learn
sh $ASSETS_DIR/testing/test.sh

export ASSETS_DIR=/tmp/lifecycle-assets/KernelGateway
aws s3 cp --recursive s3://test-domain-bucket/lifecycle-assets/KernelGateway/ $ASSETS_DIR
echo "testing kernel"
sh $ASSETS_DIR/testing/test.sh
